data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. SARAQAEL has been holding his form well, winning comfortably here over this trip two back before measuring up in Open grade over 1100m here 18 days ago. The draw isn’t ideal, but he has a terrific record on his home track here, and he should be hard to hold out. 3. KOHLER KID resumes from a spell that would have done him the world of good. He was an easy Maiden winner at Eagle Farm over 1400m in January, and has been held back to target this race. Justin P Stanley takes the ride, and from the pole position, he will be ready to rumble. 8. SWEET PRETENDER resumed at Doomben at big odds, and she had no luck when shying away from an inside run. She would like some cut in the ground, and with the blinkers on for the first time, she is not out of this at big odds. 12. WAYNO was runner-up 4 weeks ago here over 1100m and has since won a trial at the track. He cops a wide gate, but he has plenty of scope, and with some luck in the running, he can figure in the top 4. Include.","runners":[1,3,8,12],"exclusive":true}
